content:
- Completed task 20 (meta-task 18 deep skeptical review pass-2) and committed evidence + task updates.
- Gates passed: make check/test/test-bdd/lint and make test-real (logs in .ralph/evidence/meta-18-pass2-20260303T021732Z).
- Ran .ralph/task_switch.sh; repo clean; commit 2cdf4c0.

- Read `.ralph/current_tasks.md` fully and applied selection policy.
- Confirmed all bug tasks are `<passes>true</passes>`/`<passing>true</passing>`, so bug-first rule did not force a bug pick.
- Found two non-bug failing tasks: task 16 (`<priority>low</priority>`) and task 21 (no explicit priority, treated above low). Selected `.ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/21-task-do-meta-deep-skeptical-review-pass-3.md` as the next logical task and wrote it to `.ralph/current_task.txt`.
- Next: hand off with this selection and stop immediately per instructions.

- Started by reading prior memory with `.ralph/progress_read.sh`; there was no prior output this turn.
- Read `.ralph/current_task.txt` and opened `.ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/21-task-do-meta-deep-skeptical-review-pass-3.md`.
- Per user protocol, treated this as planning-only phase because no lifecycle marker existed yet.
- Ran parallel exploration across task docs and prior pass artifacts (`18`, `19`, `20`, task inventory) to build a full plan.
- Added `<execution_plan>` to pass-3 task file with detailed phases: preflight model gate, fresh-run evidence bootstrap, deep skeptical audit, fanout protocol, mandatory gates, closeout, and explicit skeptical verification requirements.
- Appended `TO BE VERIFIED` at end of pass-3 task file and intentionally did not execute plan steps yet.
- Next step when resumed: detect `TO BE VERIFIED`, perform deep skeptical verification with 16+ parallel tracks, alter at least one plan item, replace marker with `NOW EXECUTE`, then execute only the written plan.
